meta.title: Scrape locally
meta.description: Get your token and download the Dawarly Scraper desktop app to run scraping on your PC.

header.title: Scrape locally
header.description: Run the scraper on your own PC. Get your token and download the desktop app, then paste the token in the app and click Run.

token.title: Your token
token.description: Use this token in the Dawarly Scraper desktop app to connect to your account.

download.title: Desktop app
download.description: Download the Dawarly Scraper for Windows. Install, paste your token, and click Run scraper.
